---
title: "Project 2: Web Scraping"
description: "A web scraping example"
author: "Kshithy"
date: "2023-02-01"
categories: [python, web]
---

## Overview

This project scrapes data from a website.

```{python}
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

# Note: This is a placeholder, actual scraping requires careful consideration of terms of service
url = 'https://example.com'
response = requests.get(url)
soup = BeautifulSoup(response.text, 'html.parser')

print("Title:", soup.title.string)
```

## Conclusion

Web scraping can be useful for data collection.
